item.title:
Something I’m excited about: Free premium Claude and Cowork for K-12 educators and teachers in the US, together with a library of teaching skills.
To find out more, check out https://t.co/O20Lnyd3EK
item.description:
Something I’m excited about: Free premium Claude and Cowork for K-12 educators and teachers in the US, together with a library of teaching skills.
To find out more, check out https://t.co/O20Lnyd3EK

item.title: If you build something cool, send it to me?
item.description: If you build something cool, send it to me?

item.title:
Big day! Claude Cowork is coming to web and mobile, so Claude can keep working while your computer is closed.
This is a major update to Cowork. It combines the power of giving Claude access to your c
item.description:
Big day! Claude Cowork is coming to web and mobile, so Claude can keep working while your computer is closed.
This is a major update to Cowork. It combines the power of giving Claude access to your context, an advanced loop for long-running tasks, and the convenience of not needing your laptop to b

item.title:
RT @AnthropicAI: We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll be…
item.description:
RT @AnthropicAI: We’ve received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll be…

item.title:
Maybe 2026 is finally the year of the Linux Desktop!
We're launching the Claude desktop app for Linux, including Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and chat.
https://t.co/AxuwWfzWzA https://t.co/2oOktF4Yv
item.description:
Maybe 2026 is finally the year of the Linux Desktop!
We're launching the Claude desktop app for Linux, including Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and chat.
https://t.co/AxuwWfzWzA https://t.co/2oOktF4YvQ

item.title: RT @AnthropicAI: The US government, citing national security authorities, has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to F…
item.description: RT @AnthropicAI: The US government, citing national security authorities, has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to F…

item.title:
About three hours ago I decided that my espresso machine should have a display. With a $50 controller, I now have a little device that lets me control my machine.
If you have the opportunity, try ta
item.description:
About three hours ago I decided that my espresso machine should have a display. With a $50 controller, I now have a little device that lets me control my machine.
If you have the opportunity, try talking to Claude about hardware. It's *much* cheaper and easier than you might think. Fable is amazin

item.title: Are we still doing threads? Because I'd like to share some of my favorite demos I've seen people build and make with Fable in the last 24 hours.
item.description: Are we still doing threads? Because I'd like to share some of my favorite demos I've seen people build and make with Fable in the last 24 hours.

item.title: RT @ClaudeDevs: We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users. Enjoy Fable 5!
item.description: RT @ClaudeDevs: We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users. Enjoy Fable 5!

item.title:
Today, we're introducing Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, two configurations of our next major language model.
I'd normally highlight the numbers: It's SOTA on nearly all benchmarks. I want to talk about
item.description:
Today, we're introducing Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, two configurations of our next major language model.
I'd normally highlight the numbers: It's SOTA on nearly all benchmarks. I want to talk about something else, because with Fable 5 out in the world, I think a third era quietly started today.

item.title:
I'd like to tell you about a personal silly weekend project.
Because I have love for the computing of the 90s, I built Relic, a tiny coding agent that runs on ancient devices. It fits on a floppy, ne
item.description:
I'd like to tell you about a personal silly weekend project.
Because I have love for the computing of the 90s, I built Relic, a tiny coding agent that runs on ancient devices. It fits on a floppy, needs 4MB of memory, and handles systems that were made before we got HTTPS. It's made with the same s

item.title:
Also out today: You can now directly configure the effort level and adaptive thinking in Code (/effort) and Cowork!
Effort allows you to tune Claude's intelligence vs token spend, trading off capabil
item.description:
Also out today: You can now directly configure the effort level and adaptive thinking in Code (/effort) and Cowork!
Effort allows you to tune Claude's intelligence vs token spend, trading off capability for faster speed and lower costs.
Opus 4.8 respects effort levels strictly, especially at the l

item.title:
Opus 4.8 is out! It's a nice little step up for some of your most demanding work, whether that's in Cowork or Code.
It's our strongest coding model yet. In my own work, I've found it to have excellen
item.description:
Opus 4.8 is out! It's a nice little step up for some of your most demanding work, whether that's in Cowork or Code.
It's our strongest coding model yet. In my own work, I've found it to have excellent judgement, both in how much work it should do and how it should react to my steering.
It's also g

item.title: I've moved into a somewhat older house so I'm having tons of little engineering problems in the REAL PHYSICAL WORLD but I keep arming myself with illustrated instruction manuals for my specific proble
item.description:
I've moved into a somewhat older house so I'm having tons of little engineering problems in the REAL PHYSICAL WORLD but I keep arming myself with illustrated instruction manuals for my specific problems and I feel unstoppable
I'm vibeplumbing https://t.co/B2wuFINtO7

item.title:
I'm moving and found a fun little use for Claude Cowork: Hand it a floorplan and ask it create a 3D planner. The attached demo (not my real place) was a one-shot.
I also had it find all the email rec
item.description:
I'm moving and found a fun little use for Claude Cowork: Hand it a floorplan and ask it create a 3D planner. The attached demo (not my real place) was a one-shot.
I also had it find all the email receipts for furniture I got over the last few years and put in matching models.
Yesterday, I asked it

item.title:
RT @ClaudeDevs: Usage limits are up, effective today we're:
1) Doubling Claude Code's 5-hour limits for Pro, Max, Team and seat-based Ent…
item.description:
RT @ClaudeDevs: Usage limits are up, effective today we're:
1) Doubling Claude Code's 5-hour limits for Pro, Max, Team and seat-based Ent…

item.title:
AI has broken my mental model for time estimates. I used to lean on Pareto's 80/20: first 80% of the work takes 20% of the time.
I think the underlying principle is still true, but both ratio and cu
item.description:
AI has broken my mental model for time estimates. I used to lean on Pareto's 80/20: first 80% of the work takes 20% of the time.
I think the underlying principle is still true, but both ratio and curve have moved. Getting to "basically works" is nearly instant, sweating every single last detail st
